title: Shardul Amarchand Mangaldas, Linklaters facilitate Citius TransNet ₹1,105 crore IPO
description: Citius TransNet Investment Trust has made an initial public offering of equity shares aggregating to ₹1,105 crore.Shardul Amarchand Mangaldas & Co acted as legal counsel to Citius TransNet Investment Trust (the Trust), EAAA TransInfra Managers Limited (Investment Manager), and Epic TransNet Infrastructure Private Limited (Sponsor) on the Trust’s formation, private placement of securities and IPO.The Capital Markets team was led by Nikhil Naredi (Partner) and Rohit Tiwari (Partner), with
